p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∀ (w : ℕ) (args : Vector (ZMod p) w) (e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)),
    e.eval.val < 2 ^ w → Clap.assert_bits p inst✝ w args = true ∧ e = Exp.c (Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args)

by
      apply ZMod.eq_of_val_eq
      have : e.eval.val = (bits2num args).val := by
        have : e.eval.val < 2 ^ w := h
        have : (bits2num args).val = e.eval.val := by
          revert e h
          induction w with
          | zero => simp
          | succ w ih =>
            intros e h
            have : args = Vector.cons args.head args.tail := by
              ext i hi
              cases i <;> simp_all
            simp [this, bits2num, Vector.foldl]
            have : args.head.val < 2 := by
              apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt
              apply Nat.mod_lt
              apply Nat.Prime.pos
              assumption
              norm_num
            have : args.head = 0 ∨ args.head = 1 := by
              have : args.head.val = 0 ∨ args.head.val = 1 := by omega
              cases this <;> simp [*]
            cases this <;> simp [*]
            specialize ih (Exp.c ((e.eval - args.head) / 2)) (by
              have : e.eval = args.head + 2 * ((e.eval - args.head) / 2) := by
                omega
              omega)
            simp [ih]
      exact this
    exact this
  exact ⟨h₁, h₂⟩

by simp [ZMod.val_natCast]
  rw [this] at h
  have : ∃ (bits : List ℕ), e.eval.val = List.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) 0 bits ∧ bits.length ≤ w ∧ ∀ b ∈ bits, b = 0 ∨ b = 1 := by
    use Nat.toDigits 2 e.eval.val
    constructor
    · simp [Nat.toDigits_foldl]
    · constructor
      · exact Nat.size_toDigits 2 e.eval.val ▸ Nat.size_le_iff.mp (by simpa using h)
      · intro b hb

        omega
  rcases this with ⟨bits, h_val, h_len, h_bits⟩
  have : bits.length = w := by
    have : bits.length ≤ w := h_len
    have : w ≤ bits.length := by
      contrapose! h
      have : 2 ^ w ≤ e.eval.val := by
        calc
          2 ^ w ≤ 2 ^ bits.length := Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (by linarith)
          _ ≤ List.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) 0 bits := by
            induction bits generalizing 0 <;> simp_all [List.foldl, Nat.succ_mul]
            <;> omega

      omega
    linarith

    apply Vector.ext
    intro i hi
    simp [Vector.getElem_ofFn, Nat.testBit_toDigits, h_val, h_bits, this]
  rw [this]
  constructor
  · simp [Clap.assert_bits, Vector.all]
    intro i hi
    simp [Nat.testBit_toDigits, h_bits, this]
  · simp [Exp.eval, Clap.bits2num, h_val, this]
    congr
    ext i hi
    simp [Nat.testBit_toDigits, h_bits, this]

by

  · simp [h₁]
